As a Board Member, I was granted $300,000 of restricted stock  units upon being named a board member.  These fully vest on the one year anniversary of the grant.  For every year I am on the board, I am entitled to $150,000 of restricted stock units, which also fully vests on the 1 year anniversary of this award.  Currently, I have 29,645 shares of common stock and 46,440 RSU's that will vest on 6/4/2025.  Per company policy, any unvested RSUs at the time of resignation would be forfeited. (2023-07-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan, but the plan sponsor no longer makes contributions. (2002-09-01)

This is my former employer.  I had a stock plan arrangement which led to receipt of "paired interests" in the company.  This plan is no longer funded, but I still hold these paired interests.   Paired interests include one share of Class V Common and one common unit of Bakkt Opco Holdings, LLC and is exchangeable into a share of Class A Common Stock on a one-for-one basis. (2018-06-01)

Red Sky Services has a shared services agreement with the other Red Sky Holdings entities & Greater Georgia Action.  Red Sky Services allocates expenses based on the time provided  to the other entities. The expenses represent the allocated portion of shared staff, shared office occupancy costs & shared operating expenses.  Senator Loeffler is the sole funder of Red Sky Services & Red Sky Holdings entities.  The services provided to Greater Georgia Action by Red Sky Services are considered in-kind contributions to Greater Georgia Action.

Modicus Prime’s AI software provides a GxP-compatible framework for training and deploying AI models in biologics. Our proprietary software enables AI stakeholders, from domain experts to data scientists, to train and/or deploy their in-house AI to achieve real-time AI analysis of any input data - from biologic morphology analysis to commercial contamination detection - for comprehensive quality control across R&D and manufacturing.
